top10Stories.title: CVE-2026-48558
top10Stories.author: Unknown
top10Stories.summary: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without verifying their cryptographic signature. In a vulnerable configuration, a remote, unauthenticated attacker can submit a forged token containing arbitrary identity claims to obtain a fully authenticated technician session. In some configurations, this may also allow bypass of multi-factor authentication.
top10Stories.executiveSummary: CVE-2026-48558 has potential strategic risk and control implications.

mitreUpdates.title: CVE-2026-48558
mitreUpdates.author: Unknown
mitreUpdates.summary: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without verifying their cryptographic signature. In a vulnerable configuration, a remote, unauthenticated attacker can submit a forged token containing arbitrary identity claims to obtain a fully authenticated technician session. In some configurations, this may also allow bypass of multi-factor authentication.

whatChangedThisWeek.title: CVE-2026-48558
whatChangedThisWeek.author: Unknown
whatChangedThisWeek.summary: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without verifying their cryptographic signature. In a vulnerable configuration, a remote, unauthenticated attacker can submit a forged token containing arbitrary identity claims to obtain a fully authenticated technician session. In some configurations, this may also allow bypass of multi-factor authentication.
whatChangedThisWeek.executiveSummary: CVE-2026-48558 has potential strategic risk and control implications.
whatChangedThisWeek.technicalSummary: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow.
